payload.answer: Committed one memory only; duplicate deliveries should not create duplicate memories.
citations: Same input delivered three times: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: The input identifies the person only as 'Sam from Goldman'; without a unique existing entity ID or more identifiers, preserve ambiguity and avoid over-merging. The three deliveries appear to be retries of the same message, so only one memory should be created.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.

details: Created a single idempotent memory card for the repeated input.
Preserved ambiguity around which Sam and which Goldman are meant.
Did not infer that Bill Evans is specifically the jazz musician.
